claim_text: From a therapeutic perspective, multiple studies indicate that this Warburg phenotype is critical to the cancer process, thus providing the basis for developing novel therapies in which altering the fluxes through these metabolic pathways is the goal5,6,7,8,9,10,11,12 .

sub_claims.text: From a therapeutic perspective, multiple studies indicate that this Warburg phenotype is critical to the cancer process, thus providing the basis for developing novel therapies in which altering the fluxes through these metabolic pathways is the goal5,6,7,8,9,10,11,12 .
sub_claims.nuance: Source PDF not fetched during Phase 2 (paywalled or not reachable under personal-only access).
